data.title_en: Invocations for the setting of a debt

items.chapter_title_en: Invocations for the setting of a debt
items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكِ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, make what is lawful enough for me, as opposed to what is unlawful, and spare me by Your grace, of need of others.)
items.transliteration: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)

items.chapter_title_en: Invocations for the setting of a debt
items.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ)).
items.english_text: (O Allah, I take refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being over powered by men.)
items.transliteration: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasal, walbukhl, waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-hammi walhuzn, walAAajzi walkasal, walbukhl, waljubn, wadalAAid-dayni waghalabatir-rijal)
